title: HomeLane Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HomeLane Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About HomeLane Ventures Solutions:
HomeLane Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane Ventures Solutions!
